source_citation: Larran et al. 2017, Pest Manag Sci, Table 4 (allelic version C, R1 population, 1/8 clones)
notes: Confirmed directly from paper's own Table 4 - S population (KY781916) explicitly labeled wild-type/susceptible, 8/8 clones identical. Native numbering = Arabidopsis thaliana convention per paper's own text, and matches the 1Z8N crystal structure's own residue numbering exactly (verified: residue 574 in 1Z8N chain A is TRP). No offset/alignment work needed, unlike PPO. Previously-reported TSR substitution (bold in Table 4) - well-established in the ALS literature (Tranel & Wright 2002 review, cited as ref 36).

source_citation: Larran et al. 2017, Pest Manag Sci, Table 4 (allelic version H, R2 population, 2/8 clones)
notes: Same wild-type reference as Trp574Leu. Two independent clones (both accession KY781923.1 after dedup - Table 4 lists frequency 2/8) carry this single, isolated substitution. Verified: residue 653 in 1Z8N chain A is SER. Previously-reported TSR substitution (bold in Table 4).
